text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O has been feeling tired,<n>so I take her
to the infirmary for some<n>rest.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even the Overlord must refrain from<n>overwork.
Until we meet again,<n>Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? What in the world is going on<n>here?

text_block_list.name: Commoner A
text_block_list.text:
The Brilliant Nation of Opera O is most<n>worthy of
the multitalented<n>mastermind that is Lady Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Commoner B
text_block_list.text:
No! The noble, majestic Lady Opera O<n>should
come to the Opera O Grand<n>Nation!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What is happening here? Two nations<n>at war over
me?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Stop this at once! Pointless conflicts<n>bring nothing
but sorrow.

text_block_list.name: The Masses
text_block_list.text: Lady Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yearn for me all you wish, but I will<n>only ever be
mine. Even the Three<n>Goddesses are powerless
to change<n>that!

text_block_list.name: The Masses
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are we to do?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well! Do not lose heart,<n>unnamed followers
of my cause.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As an apology... please soothe your<n>wounded
hearts by basking in my<n>beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes on... MY<n>BRILLIANCE!

text_block_list.name: Commoner A
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Its shimmer stretches as far as<n>the eye can
see!

text_block_list.name: Commoner B
text_block_list.text:
This magnificent light! I must peer into<n>it longer,
even if for just one more<n>second!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now do you understand? There are<n>better things
to do than hate and<n>bicker.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Namely, praising this marvelous work<n>of
art—granted unto you by the gods<n>above—that is I,
T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Go on, shower me with adoring<n>admiration! Haaah
ha ha... Huh?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A dream? Heh, yet another legend of<n>the Overlord
has been born.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O wakes up in an amazing<n>mood,
completely back to her usual<n>self!

text_block_list.name: The Masses
text_block_list.text: Aaargh! M-my eyes! I-I can't see<n>anything!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas! Is my brilliance too blinding for<n>them to
behold?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, one and all! You must<n>endure! Everyone!
Every—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah! A dream, it was!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, those poor souls... And all<n>because of my
overwhelming beauty!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems T.M. Opera O feels too guilty<n>to focus on
her recovery.
